prompt: A hyper-realistic, wide-angle cinematic shot of a colossal, ornate golden platform floating high in a clear blue sky, carrying a single lush mansion with green gardens. The platform is supported by thousands of rusted, spindly iron pillars that disappear into a thick, dark smog below. In the shadows at the bottom, a vast, infinite sea of cramped, grey shacks stretches to the horizon. High contrast, atmospheric lighting, 8k, social commentary photography style.
insight: The richest 10% earn over half of global income while the bottom 50% earn only 8%.
